subcodes.first_line: The Book of Names hath verily been sent down in truth from God, the Lord of the Day of Return, and therein have We enjoined upon every name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الاسماء قد نزل بالحق من لدی الله مالک یوم المعاد و وصینا فیه کل اسم من
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God
